summary: A 'Last Week at DHS' weekly roundup: event B-roll (Secretary's Awards ceremony, Women in Law Enforcement Task Force gathering, FEMA WinterReady Summit, Border Patrol Angel Tree gift donation) with long explanatory text captions narrating each item. It is an informational corporate recap of departmental activities, not a music-driven cinematic or genre piece, and carries no youth-pop-culture appeal.
notable_text: Secretary's Awards; Women in Law Enforcement Task Force; #WinterReady 'Give the Gift of Warmth'; Border Patrol 'Angel Tree'; Salvation Army
